---
title: "Genome Assembly"
author: "Miroslava Guerrero"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: 
 html_document:
    code_folding: show
    collapse: no
    df_print: paged
    fig_caption: yes
    fig_height: 6
    fig_width: 10
    highlight: textmate
    theme: spacelab
    toc: yes
    toc_float: yes
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Set options, housekeeping
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	include = TRUE,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE)
```


# Workshop 2 - Genome assembly
